miniBMIText: This result only reflects the ratio of your weight to your height. For personalized recommendations based on your age, gender, body fat percentage, and to discover your daily calorie needs...
miniWaterText: The calculated amount is your baseline requirement for a standard day. To create a dynamic water schedule that adjusts for your exercise intensity and local weather...
healthToolsText: Support your fitness journey with data and track your progress with precision
advancedBMI: Go beyond height and weight. Analyze your body composition and metabolic rate.
advancedWater: A smart schedule based on your activity level and local weather conditions.
caloriTrack: Track the total energy you burn in a week, based on your training intensity. (Coming soon)
advancedBMIFormP: Please fill in all your information completely for more accurate results.
advancedBMIDailyActivity5: Extra Active (Very heavy exercise or physical job)
advancedBMIResultTextBefore: Please fill out the form on the left to start the calculation
bmiSummaryText: Based on your current data, you should consume approximately {{tdee}} calories per day to maintain your weight. For healthy progress, it is recommended to adjust this value carefully.
waterCalcDesc: Find out exactly how much water your body needs to stay hydrated daily.
waterReminderText: Remember: Tea and coffee do not replace water; in fact, they can lead to dehydration.
waterResultWaitingDesc: Enter your weight and activity details to see your personalized goal.
exerciseDesc: Regular exercise refreshes not just your body, but your mind as well.
waterDesc: Water is the primary energy source for your cells and boosts your metabolism.
nutritionDesc: You are what you eat. Give your body the high-quality nutrients it deserves.
sleepDesc: Time to rest under the stars. Quality sleep is the key to recovery.
discoverDesc: Push your limits, unlock your potential. Your true journey begins now.
optionLearnDesc: Explore the world of nutrition and training, stay fit with personalized advice.
optionCalcDesc: Start now by calculating your Body Mass Index and daily water needs.
heroTitle: Fisoyl: More Than Just a Name
storyText: Fisoyl is not just about home workouts. We believe that healthy living is a holistic journey. In an era where information is abundant but clarity is scarce, Fisoyl stands as your digital companion—guiding you through nutrition plans, exercise techniques, and essential calculation tools every step of the way.

features.guide: Comprehensive Guidance: We don't just tell you what to do, we teach you how and why.
features.anywhere: No Boundaries: At home or at the gym; with or without equipment, adapt to any environment.
features.dataDriven: Data-Driven: Manage everything from BMI to daily water intake with your personal data.

closing: You've taken the first step. Now, let’s turn that step into a lifelong journey.
exploreSubtitle: Explore our guide and take your first step.
title: Contribute to Growth
subtitle: Let's make Fisoyl a better guide together. Your bug reports and suggestions are invaluable to us.
infoText: Found a bug? Or have a new feature suggestion? While we don't provide professional health advice, we welcome all feedback to improve the platform.
success: Message received! Thanks for helping us grow Fisoyl. We'll check it out as soon as possible. 🚀
